sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n26064" key="dia/tilma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">διάτιλμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n26064.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">portion plucked off,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">φύλλων</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.71</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (Paul. Sil.).</sense> </entryFree>
